title: Find a Client
description: Search for and pitch to potential clients. You need to find someone willing to pay for a small website.

title: Deliver the Project
description: Build and deliver the website to your client. Your reputation depends on quality and timeliness.

title: Recruit Developers
description: Post job listings and interview candidates for your first developer positions.

title: Establish Team Culture
description: Build team cohesion and establish company values and processes.
